signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Sport is growing and the consumer is proving to be resilient... we saw momentum building throughout the quarter, heading into back-to-school.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We continue to expect SG&A to slightly outpace revenue growth... more specifically at the high end of mid-single digits.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: NIKE Brand ASPs are up across footwear and apparel across all geographies as we focus on the price value of our products.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Our Q1 results reaffirm our expectation for healthy profitable growth this fiscal year. For the full year, we continue to expect reported revenue to grow mid-single digits.
